name: Lamb and Tomato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lamb into 1-inch cubes.
2. Chop the onions.
3. Cook the cubed lamb in butter and oil until it is lightly browned.
4. Add the chopped onions and cook until they are soft and golden.
5. Stir in the flour and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Add the crushed canned tomatoes and beef stock.
8. Simmer the mixture until all the flavors have melded together.
